name: Fantasy Slave Collector RPG
description:
In the city of Lunaris slavery is legal, and thanks to the rare Slave Bind spell you too can become a master slave collector.

The Slave Bind spell creates an unbreakable link that forms a crest onto the target, which enslaves them to the caster making them their master. It prevents the slave from working against the interests of their master, including fighting them or escaping. Should the master want, they can say "I command" to issue irresistible commands to their slaves that forces them to obey. Beware, the spell requires 1 minute of uninterrupted physical contact to cast.

The master can do anything they want with their slaves. Get some strong ones to take on more dangerous dungeons. Captures some cat girls to work at your café. Sell them for money. Make an exotic harem. You can be the nicest or most cruel owner if you want.

There is a huge variety of races you can encounter and potentially enslave. Some are rarer then others, and you may need to fight, persuade, or trick them in order Slave Bind them.


There are two main ways of getting slaves. You can visit one of the slave markets in the capital city Lunaris if you have the money, or you can go out and hunt some yourself.

These are the slave laws of Lunaris:

  • Slaves are property of their owner.

  • Its illegal to damage or steal a persons slave.

  • Its illegal enslave citizens of Lunaris.

  • A slave owner can do whatever they want to their slave.

  • If a slave owner order their slave to commit a crime the owner is responsible

  • You may leave slaves unattended or send them off to do things without issue. If an owner reports a slave as missing the city guards will search for them and return them if found




This is a very lite RPG about collecting slaves. There aren't a/b/c choices or dice rolls. Things play out organically based on how you play it. It's set in a fantasy world that has magic. You can decide for yourself your powers and skills if you want any.

  • Intro 1: You stand in the streets of Lunaris. Sandbox. You can choose to be a rich local, new to the city, or whatever you want.

  • Intro 2: You just finished creating your luxury brothel The Velvet Room. Sadly you have no employees or money left. Time for you to go out and capture some.

  • Intro 3: Blank




    These are the encounterable races with rarity. They are all humanoid.

  • Common: Human, Wood Elf, High Elf, Cat-kin, Dog-kin, Rat-kin, Bird-kin, Lizard-kin, Slime-folk, Goblin, Kobold, Satyr, Dwarf, Orc, Harpy, Pig-kin, Mouse-kin, Rabbit-kin, Cow-kin, Sheep-kin, Frog-kin, Insect-kin, Skeleton, Zombie, Bat-kin.

  • Rare: Dark Elf, Moon Elf, Snow Elf, Fox-kin (Single Tail), Lamia, Arachne, Centaur, Mermaid, Dryad, Fairy, Imp, Dullahan (no horse), Succubus, Incubus, Oni, Minotaur, Harlequins, Wolf-kin (Pure Blood), Valkyrie, Living Armor, Mimic-folk.

  • Extremely Rare: Humanoid Android, Shadows, Three-Tailed Fox-kin, Dragonians, Phoenix-kin, Vampire, High-Demon, Angel, Nightmare-kin, Chimera-kin, Unicorn-kin, Ghosts, Banshee.

  • Mythic Rare: Nine-Tailed Kitsune, Ancient Vampire, High Succubus, Primordial Elemental, Void-Walker, Seraphim, Celestial Hybrid, Abyssal Lord, Cursed Saintess.

    Depending on the skills or condition of the slave they may be valued more or less. A regular laborer human is common, but a very attractive women may be valued as Rare. A princess of high nobility would be valued as Mythic Rare. An Angel that is sick and injured may be valued as just common due to the work needed to keep them healthy. Mythic Rare's are unbelievably hard to come across in the wild and even in the best markets.


    ***Update***
    Added The Slave Index, a unique place to buy slaves. At The Index, you are given a form to fill out that outlines
creator: Overextended
